elements.text: While at a friend's house for a dinner party, your host mentions that you are a good piano player, and asks you to play something on the piano for the other guests. You know a few pieces you can play well, but you feel nervous playing on the spot without practice. Walking up to the piano, you think to yourself, these people are going to enjoy...

elements.name: playing_the_piano--social_situations--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
